member.name: T:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController
member.summary: API Controller for TagManager operations. Provides endpoints for reading, creating, updating, and deleting Umbraco tags, as well as managing tag relationships across content and media nodes.

member.name: F:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.TagEditorAliases
member.summary: Stored as a set for O(1) lookup and easy extensibility.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.GetTagById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single tag by its database ID, including tagged documents, media, and all other tags in the same group.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.GetTagsInGroup(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all tags within a named group, including relationship counts.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.Save(Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags)
member.summary: Creates a new tag or updates an existing one. When merging into another tag (), tag relationships are re-pointed and the original is cleaned up.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.DeleteTag(Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags)
member.summary: Deletes a tag and its relationships, then removes the tag value from all associated content and media properties.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.GetTagsInGroupForTag(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a representing all tags in the same group as the given tag ID, with the matching tag pre-selected.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.CreateTag(Umbraco.Cms.Core.Scoping.IScope,Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags)
member.summary: Inserts a new tag. Returns 0 if the tag already exists, otherwise 1. Populates .Id with the newly created record's ID.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.UpdateTag(Umbraco.Cms.Core.Scoping.IScope,Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags)
member.summary: Updates an existing tag's name, optionally merging it into another tag. Then synchronises property values on all related content and media nodes.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.UpdateContentProperties(Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags,System.String)
member.summary: Iterates all tagged content nodes and updates the tag property value to reflect the renamed or removed tag.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.UpdateMediaProperties(Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags,System.String)
member.summary: Iterates all tagged media nodes and updates the tag property value to reflect the renamed or removed tag.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.GetCurrentTagTexts(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the current tag texts for a given entity and group. Fetched once per entity and shared across all property iterations.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.ApplyTagUpdatesToProperties(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Umbraco.Cms.Core.Models.IProperty},Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Iterates an entity's properties and updates any tag picker properties that belong to the tag being modified.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.IsTagProperty(Umbraco.Cms.Core.Models.IProperty,Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary:
Determines whether a property should be updated.
A property qualifies if: 1. Its PropertyType.Id matches the tag's stored PropertyTypeId (most precise), OR 2. Its editor alias is a known tag editor AND the entity has tags in the relevant group.
The list is passed in to avoid a repeated DB call per property on the same entity.

member.name: M:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiController.SetUpdatedTagValue(Umbraco.Cms.Core.Models.IProperty,Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Models.CmsTags,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary:
Sets the updated value on a tag property.
Strategy: - If the old name is known and present in the stored string, do a targeted replace (preserves ordering and avoids a full rewrite). - Otherwise fall back to writing the full current tag list from the database, which is the authoritative source of truth.

member.name: T:Umbraco_Tag_Manager.Controllers.TagManagerApiControllerBase
member.summary: Base controller for TagManager API endpoints
